name: Easy Bbq beans

ingredients.item: can of pinto or cannellini beans

method: 1 Preheat a saucepan over the medium heat.
2 Then drain and rinse the beans.
3 Put bell pepper, onion, and 2-3 tbsp. of veggie stock or water for
5 Lower the heat. Then add beans, liquid smoke, and BBQ Sauce.
6 Stir constantly until the beans are coated thoroughly.
7 Simmer it for around 10-15 minutes, then turn off the heat.
